purpose: Read-only display surface for BaoFu settlement account state and failed-state feedback on role status pages.
rationale: The status page needs durable account-state feedback, especially failed-state reason and next step, without turning the page into an onboarding checklist. TDesign cell visually reads as a selectable form row in this flow, so this component uses TDesign tag/icon primitives inside a compact status panel and read-only detail rows.
